name: Mastodon Feed
description: Latest statuses from a Mastodon account. The user supplies `instance` (host) and `userId` (numeric account id) in per-instance config; the http URL is templated accordingly at fetch time. The install flow prompts for a `MASTODON_TOKEN` (Bearer; the standard `/oauth/token` flow is documented in the widget skill). The source calls `GET /api/v1/accounts/{userId}/statuses?limit=5` and projects the most-recent status's `content` / `account.display_name` / `created_at`, plus a flat array of recent status contents for the list layouts. Egress is intentionally empty: the instance host is templated from user config, so the install prompt surfaces the `EGRESS_UNRESTRICTED` notice (same pattern as the `rss` widget).
